title: [kimi-review] 2357144: [SEVERITY: low] "Resolves l5ym." is issue-tracker metadata e
description:
Commit: 235714407
Message: docs(meshtastic): clarify has_portnum contract in adapter (l5ym)

Finding: [SEVERITY: low] "Resolves l5ym." is issue-tracker metadata embedded in a source doc comment. It's meaningless to readers without tracker context and adds noise to a contract description. That belongs in the commit message (where it already is), not in the header.
close_reason: Removed tracker metadata "(l5ym)" from l5ym.json description. Source docs and header comments now free of issue IDs. Matches review guidance (metadata belongs only in commit msg). Commit c40fa63c9.
